TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qus ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 14 buwan, 47 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 40 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 79%, Amis 4%, Paywan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. qalang Qus ga ungat pqwasan biru. qalang Qus ga ungat kyokay. qalang Qus ga ungat hasisyo. qalang Qus ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Qus ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Qus ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qus hya' ga Rahu'. tay mkraya' na Qus hya' ga Kayway. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč qus~…ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat kjokaj. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat Ňčas~…ēal s~…ēexu. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat Ňčas~…ēal pkita nő≤u. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a rańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a kajwaj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Qus ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 14 buwan, 47 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 40 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 79%, Amis 4%, Paywan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. qalang Qus ga ungat pqwasan biru. qalang Qus ga ungat kyokay. qalang Qus ga ungat hasisyo. qalang Qus ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Qus ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Qus ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qus hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qus hya' ga Rahu'. tay mkraya' na Qus hya' ga Kayway. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč qus~…ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat kjokaj. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat Ňčas~…ēal s~…ēexu. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru. qalaŇč qus~…ē …£a uŇčat Ňčas~…ēal pkita nő≤u. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a rańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na qus~…ē ńßja Ē …£a kajwaj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
